system.notes:
Small short-range craft holding up to four people; used for transport between habitats. Cannot land.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.35): Flitter · 10 · 2 · 2 · Chemical · 3 · Batteries · 30% · 1(10MU) · 4m3 · 1 · None · 0 · 3 · 1 · None

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 10 million eb; Crew 2; Passengers 2; Drive Type Chemical; Burn Elements 3; Power Type Batteries; Sensors 30%; Computers 1 (10MU); Cargo 4m3; Actions 1; Weapon Spaces None; Armor (max SP) 0; Damage Points 3; Overkill Points 1; Shuttlecraft None.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
